title: The Single Standard
writer: Adela Rogers St. Johns, Josephine Lovett, Marian Ainslee
actors: Greta Garbo, Nils Asther, Johnny Mack Brown
plot: Wealthy Arden Stuart is bored in a party. After refusing Tommy Hewlett's marriage proposal, she has her driver drive her to a lonely place, where they make love and return to the party, where she witnesses her chauffeur commit sui...
